description: The Slider component allows for an object to be grabbed and moved. See Usage for more information.

fields.EditModeOnly: Determines if this grabbable is effective only in Edit Mode
fields.AllowSteal: Other users can grab the slot this component is attached to. Like a flag in capture the flag.
fields.DropOnDisable: The parent slot will be dropped when this component is disabled.
fields.DontDrive: Write the transforms every game tick, rather than driving it on the local machine and then sending the final value to the host.
fields.AllowOnlyPhysicalGrab: Only allow grab an object with a physical interaction - remote grabs are not allowed
fields.ActiveUserFilter: Changes if this component can be grabbed based on who is the active user if any.
fields.CustomGrabCheck: Not Usable inside Resonite Requires a mod for interacting with Sync Delegates
fields._grabber: Automatically Assigned, the grabber that is grabbing this component.
fields._holdSlot: The slot that is "holding" this slot, but not actually acting as this slider's parent.
fields._pos: The field this is currently driving for position.
fields._rot: The field this is currently driving for rotation.
fields._scl: The field this is currently driving for scale.
fields.__legacyActiveUserRootOnly: Automatically Assigned Legacy do not use. Used to handle whether only the active user can grab. Use ``ActiveUserFilter`` instead!
fields.Rotatable: Whether the slider object is rotatable.
fields.Range: The range that the object is allowed to move position wise.
fields.Origin: The origin of the range that the object is allowed to move.
fields.MinScale: The minimum scale the object can be scaled to.
fields.MaxScale: The maximum scale the object can be scaled to.
fields.VibrationOffset: The offset of the vibration intensity.
fields.VibrationPreset: The preset for triggering vibration with this object.
fields.SnapIncrement: What increment the position of this object should snap to, instead of allowing smooth movement.
fields.SnapTime: The time the object will take to move to a snap position when it snaps.
fields.SnapOnRelease: Only snap to positions in ``SnapPositions`` when released rather than always.
fields.SnapPositions: Positions to snap to while grabbing or when released.
fields.posOffset: How much to offset the slider's position.
fields.rotOffset: How much to offset the slider's rotation.
fields.referenceParent: The slot that is supposed to be this slider's parent.

usage: This can be used for NPC pickups, grabbing objects and moving them without parenting under a user, or for sliding doors. this can also be used for physical sliders like on audio boards like mixers.
